DP.510.0000:
Floaroma Town was a barren, desolate
hill long ago.\f
People started planting flowers on it
because it was such a sad place.\f
But nothing would grow...
People didn’t know what to do...\f
And then one day, someone expressed
thanks for the blessings of nature.\f
Then, the whole hill burst into bloom.
Isn’t that strange and wonderful?
DP.510.0001:
Do you think it’s cute how
Pokémon pluck Berries?
DP.510.0002:
Yes! You agreed!
Here’s the TM for the move Pluck!\f
DP.510.0003:
Oh...
I guess I just like weird things...
DP.510.0004:
When a Pokémon uses Pluck, it eats
a Berry held by its foe in battle.\f
I like how it steals a Berry.
It’s so cute!
